rulings.Case Title: FRANK AZAD VS. BETH WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, October 2, 2008, line 6. DEFENDANT DEVIN NGUYEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Mr. Nguyen shifted the bruden of producing evidence by demonstrating that he was not home at the time of the event causing damage to plaintiff and there is no evidence that the moving party engaged in any act of trespass or nuisance. Plaintiff fails to present evidence of a triable issue of fact. Defendant's objection to Azad declaration paragraph 5 is overruled and is sustained as to paragraph 12. The objections to exhibits A and B are sustained as hearsay. Objections to C and the C C & R's are overruled. =(302/PJM/VC)
